name: Gourmet Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown pork chops in butter.
2. Season with spices.
3. Remove from skillet.
4. Add mushrooms to drippings and sauté.
5. Mix in remaining ingredients, except sour cream; stir until well blended.
6. Return pork chops to skillet.
7. Cover and simmer for 1 hour until done.
8. Add sour cream and heat through; do not boil.
9. Serve immediately.
